lineage.method: v_alpha_v1_lsk3 11-factor + F62 settlement_cycle_premium_60d (M2.3, weight -0.08) + F-cascade liq_cascade_recency_score_5d (SP-A, weight +0.05). Stacked with W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay.

mutual_orthogonality_audit_2026_04_29.verdict: Both factors retain near-full orthogonal G6-significant signal even after conditioning on each other. Ideal additive setup.

thesis_profile.market_mechanism: v7 score: combines lsk3 11-factor + F62 (settlement-cycle pre-settlement-hour drift, MF-15) + F-cascade (liquidation cascade impulse-response, MF-12). Both M2.x score-integrated winners verified mutually orthogonal: F62 retains residual IC -0.040 (t=-6.54) after conditioning on lsk3 + F-cascade; F-cascade retains +0.060 (t=+10.43) after conditioning on lsk3 + F62. Hypothesis: walk-forward improvements should be approximately additive. Stacked with W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: Same long-short top-3 perp construction. Score adds -0.08*z(F62) + 0.05*z(F-cascade) to lsk3 raw. Position size multiplied by W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay. Falsified if (a) walk_forward median sharpe drops below v6 (+2.373) without compensating regime improvement; OR (b) regime_holdout fails (worst regime below -2.0 OR positive_regime_fraction below 1/3); OR (c) combined factor turnover exceeds capacity gate (max_trade_participation_rate > 0.005).
thesis_profile.factor_formula: raw = -0.20*z(iv_smooth_60) -0.10*z(rv_5) +0.18*z(dh_60) +0.15*z(dh_5) -0.07*z(tt_smooth_5) -0.10*z(liquidity_stress_qv_iv) -0.06*z(momentum_decay_5_20) +0.05*z(taker_imb_dispersion) -0.05*z(quality_funding_oi) +0.10*z(downside_upside_vol_ratio_30) +0.07*z(funding_basis_residual_implied_repo_30) -0.04*z(settlement_cycle_premium_60d) +0.03*z(liq_cascade_recency_score_5d); final_score = tanh((percentile_rank(raw)-0.5)*1.80); target_weight_per_name = (long_leverage/top_K - short_leverage/bottom_K) * regime_gating_v2_multiplier(t)

full_standalone_weights_(F62=-0.08, F-ca.verdict: FAILED — combination over-saturates score in trend regime; rotation drops below -2.0 floor

halved_weights_(F62=-0.04, F-cascade=+0..verdict: PASS — selected. Best worst-regime margin of all candidates (-1.823 vs baseline -1.851, v5 -1.997, v6 -1.851)

key_research_finding: Orthogonal factors at standalone-Pareto-optimal weights are NOT additive when combined. F62 and F-cascade are mutually G6 orthogonal (each retains 92-97% of residual signal after conditioning on the other), yet combining them at standalone weights (F62=-0.08, F-cascade=+0.05) over-tilts the score and breaks regime gates (worst -2.096, regime FAIL). Halving both weights restores admission but yields walk-forward LOWER than either factor used alone (+2.304 vs v5 +2.544 or v6 +2.373). Cross-section rank quality degrades when multiple aggressive tilts compete. Lesson: when adding multiple admitted factors to the same score, weight calibration must be JOINT, not standalone-stacked.
active_alternative_reason: v7 score = lsk3 + F62 (w=-0.04) + F-cascade (w=+0.03). NOT a walk-forward winner (v5/v6 each beat it on raw walk-forward), but has the BEST worst-regime margin of all M2.x candidates (-1.823 vs v1/v6 -1.851 / v5 -1.997). Selected over taking both factors at standalone weights (which broke regime). Active alternative for operators prioritizing worst-regime safety; v5 / v6 remain better picks for raw walk-forward maximization.
